goal: Close aeiouboy/hr#54 — build greenfield ADMIN approver surface at /admin/change-requests that consumes humi-profile-slice.pendingChanges (created by #53 employee submit flow), wired to existing adminApprove/adminReject actions with audit of reason + effective-date awareness. Do NOT unify with use-workflows (generic leave/OT) or workflow-approvals (5-persona) stores — dedicated bridge only.

contextReferences: EXISTING /admin/self-service/ has field-config / visibility / mandatory / readonly / quick-actions / tiles config subsurfaces — NO approver queue yet

EXISTING src/frontend/src/stores/humi-profile-slice.ts has pendingChanges[], adminApprove(id), adminReject(id), toggleAdminMode(), attachments[] — zero UI consumers of adminApprove/adminReject to date

#53 closed (commit 469d057) — employee submit flow at /profile/me now creates PendingChange with optional sectionKey ('emergencyContact'|'address'|'contact'|'bank'|'personal') via submitChangeRequest()
COEXISTING stores (do NOT unify): use-workflows (generic leave/OT/expense workflows at /workflows/page.tsx), workflow-approvals 5-persona store at /ess/workflows/page.tsx — different domains
memory/feedback_stop_asking_execute.md — Ken directive is clear; autonomous run continues
PendingChange shape: {id, field, oldValue, newValue, effectiveDate, attachmentIds[], requestedAt, status, approvedAt?, sectionKey?}
ironteam #53 introduced 5 section keys; approver UI groups by sectionKey
existingPatterns: Admin surfaces live under src/frontend/src/app/[locale]/admin/<feature>/page.tsx with layout.tsx
humi-profile-slice adminApprove/adminReject signatures take only changeId — extend minimally with optional reason
FileAttachment carries base64 data; approver surface can link to attachments referenced in pendingChange.attachmentIds
Thai-primary labels via next-intl messages/th.json; ess.* branch already exists (extended by #53)

constraints: C1 surgical — create /admin/change-requests NEW route; edit humi-profile-slice minimally (add optional reason? parameter to adminApprove/adminReject); do NOT refactor use-workflows or workflow-approvals
C3 simplicity — ONE list view + ONE card component + ONE reason modal; no tab/filter abstraction unless genuinely needed
C6 — no silent catch; console.warn on any guard
C7 SSoT — consume humi-profile-slice store directly; do NOT create a parallel approval store; do NOT bridge to use-workflows WorkflowItem adapter
C8 source-grounded — every label traces to #54 issue body OR #53 spec v2 AC-7 pending semantics; 5 section keys from #53 are the authoritative set
C10 Thai-primary — no SF-paren; no em-dash bilingual duplicates; new i18n keys under ess.approver.* (append to existing ess branch, do NOT touch other keys)
Rule 22 — target ~5-6 files across all task IDs; no agent > 8 files
Rule 21 — MK VI writes tests, JARVIS runs them

Effective date semantic (BRD SH6-SH8): approved CR does NOT auto-apply to employee master on approval timestamp; it marks approvedAt + preserves effectiveDate. Applying effective-date to the master is out of scope (backend/cron)
ADMIN view only — employee-side workflow list lives at /ess/workflows/ (different store) and is out of scope here

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-1: New route /admin/change-requests/page.tsx renders a list of all humi-profile-slice.pendingChanges with status='pending'; each item shows employee identifier (from attachment context or placeholder), sectionKey label (Thai), field label, oldValue→newValue diff, effectiveDate, requestedAt timestamp, and attachment count

AC-2: Each pending item has two primary actions: 'อนุมัติ' and 'ปฏิเสธ'; clicking either opens a shared reason modal with textarea (optional for approve, required for reject) + Confirm/Cancel; confirm calls humi-profile-slice.adminApproveWithReason(id, reason?) or adminRejectWithReason(id, reason?)

AC-3: humi-profile-slice extended — adminApproveWithReason(changeId, reason?: string) and adminRejectWithReason(changeId, reason?: string) variants added; extend PendingChange with optional reason?: string; reason persists to store on decision; existing adminApprove/adminReject signatures preserved (additive, not renamed) for C7 SSoT compatibility

AC-4: List groups by sectionKey with visual Thai labels (ผู้ติดต่อฉุกเฉิน / ที่อยู่ / ข้อมูลติดต่อ / บัญชีธนาคาร / ข้อมูลส่วนตัว); items without sectionKey (legacy single-field CRs from pre-#53) fall into ข้อมูลส่วนตัว group; empty state = 'ไม่มีคำขอรอดำเนินการ'

AC-5: Approved and rejected items render in a second list section ('ประวัติคำขอ') below pending list, read-only, with status chip (เขียว/แดง) + approvedAt timestamp + reason (if any); limit last 20 decisions (no pagination scope)

AC-6: After approve/reject, list updates live (via Zustand subscription); pending count in header badge decrements by 1; approved/rejected count in history section increments by 1 — no manual refresh required

AC-7: Attachments referenced by pendingChange.attachmentIds are displayed as clickable filenames inside the item card (click → open base64 dataURL in new tab OR download); file icon + size in human-readable units (KB/MB)
AC-8: C10 Thai-primary — every new visible string Thai via t('ess.approver.*'); grep sweep over new files finds zero bilingual duplicates; Approve/Reject actions = 'อนุมัติ'/'ปฏิเสธ' not English

AC-9: Vitest suite — new tests cover AC-1 (list render with multiple sectionKeys), AC-2 (modal open+confirm flow), AC-3 (store action extensions + reason persistence), AC-4 (grouping), AC-6 (live update on approve). Min ≥1 passing test per AC 1/2/3/4/6
AC-10: Suite green — no regression on existing humi-profile-slice tests or #53's 6 new test files; baseline post-#53 = 1217 pass / 9 fail; post-#54 must maintain or improve

evaluationPrinciples.name: single-source-of-truth

inScope: EDIT humi-profile-slice.ts — add adminApproveWithReason + adminRejectWithReason (additive); extend PendingChange with optional reason?: string
Append ess.approver.* i18n keys to messages/th.json + en.json
Wire link from /admin nav or /admin/self-service to /admin/change-requests (discovery)
outOfScope: Unifying humi-profile-slice / use-workflows / workflow-approvals stores — separate consolidation task
Employee-side workflow list (/ess/workflows/ already owns this surface)
Backend/cron job that applies approved CRs to employee master on effectiveDate — infrastructure task
Email/push notification triggers on submit or decision — infrastructure
Audit log persistence beyond in-memory store — backend

systemInvariants: All profile-data CR approvals route through humi-profile-slice.adminApproveWithReason or adminRejectWithReason — no parallel approval store introduced
humi-profile-slice remains the SINGLE source of pendingChanges state for profile-data CRs (C7 non-negotiable)
Approval does NOT mutate the employee master record — it flips status + stores reason + approvedAt; applying the change to master is backend/cron (out of scope)
PendingChange is immutable except for status, approvedAt, and reason transitions (existing immutability preserved)
Existing adminApprove(id) and adminReject(id) signatures are preserved as thin wrappers that call the With-Reason variants with undefined reason — zero breaking change to any consumer
Live subscription invariant — approver list MUST re-render on pendingChanges state change without manual refresh (Zustand's reactive model)
C10: every new user-facing string Thai-primary via i18n key; English-only labels forbidden
